attributes.title: [Traefik OTel] Process
attributes.description: Traefik process health: CPU, memory, goroutines, and file descriptor usage.

params.markdown:
## [Traefik OTel] Process

This dashboard monitors Traefik process health:
- CPU consumption rate
- Memory usage (RSS, heap)
- Goroutine and thread counts
- File descriptor usage vs limit
- GC activity

query.esql:
FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE process_cpu_seconds_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(process_cpu_seconds_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
| EVAL duration_sec = DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts)
| EVAL cpu_rate = CASE(duration_sec > 0, total / duration_sec, 0.0)
| KEEP cpu_rate

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE process_cpu_seconds_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(process_cpu_seconds_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
| EVAL duration_sec = DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts)
| EVAL cpu_rate = CASE(duration_sec > 0, total / duration_sec, 0.0)
| KEEP cpu_rate

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE process_resident_memory_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS rss = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_resident_memory_bytes))

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE process_resident_memory_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS rss = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_resident_memory_bytes))

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE go_goroutines IS NOT NULL
| STATS goroutines = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_goroutines))

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE go_goroutines IS NOT NULL
| STATS goroutines = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_goroutines))

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE process_open_fds IS NOT NULL AND process_max_fds IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_open_fds)), max_fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_max_fds))
| EVAL fd_pct = CASE(max_fds > 0, open_fds / max_fds, 0.0)

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE process_open_fds IS NOT NULL AND process_max_fds IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_open_fds)), max_fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_max_fds))
| EVAL fd_pct = CASE(max_fds > 0, open_fds / max_fds, 0.0)

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS heap_sys = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes))
| EVAL heap_sys_mb = heap_sys / 1048576, gauge_min = 0, gauge_max = 1000

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS heap_sys = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes))
| EVAL heap_sys_mb = heap_sys / 1048576, gauge_min = 0, gauge_max = 1000

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE process_cpu_seconds_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(process_cpu_seconds_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_secs = GREATEST(DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts), 1)
| EVAL cpu_rate = total / bucket_secs
| KEEP time_bucket, cpu_rate
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE process_cpu_seconds_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(process_cpu_seconds_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_secs = GREATEST(DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts), 1)
| EVAL cpu_rate = total / bucket_secs
| KEEP time_bucket, cpu_rate
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE process_resident_memory_bytes IS NOT NULL OR go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS rss = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_resident_memory_bytes)), heap_inuse = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE process_resident_memory_bytes IS NOT NULL OR go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS rss = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_resident_memory_bytes)), heap_inuse = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE go_goroutines IS NOT NULL
| STATS goroutines = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_goroutines)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE go_goroutines IS NOT NULL
| STATS goroutines = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_goroutines)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE process_open_fds IS NOT NULL OR process_max_fds IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_open_fds)), max_fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_max_fds)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE process_open_fds IS NOT NULL OR process_max_fds IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_open_fds)), max_fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(process_max_fds)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC
